title: centaurea boissieri subsp. rouyi
intro: Centaurea boissieri subsp. rouyi is a subspecies of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae), also known as a wild thistle, native to the Iberian Peninsula. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Centaurea boissieri subsp. rouyi include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestive issues, and provide relief from respiratory problems. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed and utilized for various health benefits.
